examples: If you require further information, you should consult the registrar.
If your request is for information about a child, please contact the registrar to find out how to make such a request.
These data are equivalent to those produced by the registrar general.

David Robilliard, the Deputy Registrar General of Electors, said he hoped residents would cast their vote.
